name: Tianyun International Holdings Limited
summary: Tianyun International Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, manufactures and sells processed fruit products; and trades fresh fruits in the People's Republic of China, Hong Kong, and internationally. It operates through Own Brand Sales, OEM Sales, and Fresh Fruits Sales and Others segments. The company offers various processed fruit products, such as strawberry, apricot, peach, pear, apple, pineapple, and mixed fruits under the Tiantong Food, Bingo -My Times, and Guo Xiao Lan brand names. It also engages in the manufacture and trading of food machineries. Tianyun International Holdings Limited was founded in 2003 and is based in Linyi, the People's Republic of China.
